title: TP Spawn
description: Lets you go to world spawn with a command.
body:
# **🌍 TPSpawn - Simple & Configurable Spawn Teleportation**

TPSpawn is a lightweight and highly configurable plugin that allows players to teleport to the world's spawn point with ease. Perfect for survival, semi-vanilla, or roleplay servers, this plugin enhances player navigation while providing cooldown and sound options for a balanced experience.

## **📌 Features**

✅ Teleport to Spawn – Instantly teleport to the world's spawn with /spawn.

✅ Customizable Cooldown – Set a cooldown to prevent spam (/tpspawn cooldown <seconds>).

✅ Teleport Sound Effect – Enable or disable a sound when teleporting (/tpspawn sound <true/false>).

✅ Configuration Reload – Quickly apply changes with /tpspawn reload.

✅ Permissions Support – Manage player access with permission nodes.

✅ Folia Support – Fully compatible with Folia for enhanced performance and scalability, ensuring smooth operation even on large servers.

## **🎮 Commands**

🔹 `/spawn` – Teleports the player to the world spawn.

🔹 `/tpspawn reload` – Reloads the plugin configuration.

🔹 `/tpspawn cooldown <seconds>` – Sets the teleport cooldown.

🔹 `/tpspawn sound <true/false>` – Toggles the teleport sound.

🔹 `/tpspawn help` – Displays available commands.

## **🔑 Permissions**

`tpspawn.command.spawn` – Allows use of /spawn.

`tpspawn.command.edit` – Grants access to admin commands.

`tpspawn.cooldown.bypass` – Bypass the teleport cooldown.

## **⚙️ Configuration**

Modify settings directly in the config file or use commands to adjust values dynamically.

## **📥 Installation**

1️⃣ Download the plugin .jar file.
2️⃣ Place it into your server's plugins folder.
3️⃣ Restart the server.
4️⃣ Configure settings in config.yml (optional).

## **🚀 Compatibility**

✔️ Minecraft Version: [1.21+]

✔️ Platform: Paper / Purpur (Bukkit & Spigot not tested, proceed at your own risk!)

✔️ Folia: Fully supported for enhanced performance and scalability

TPSpawn is designed to be simple yet powerful, giving server owners control over spawn teleportation without unnecessary complexity.
